message:
Merge polecat/furiosa/gt-5rne: ZFC remove policy decisions from witness handlers

Remove hardcoded escalation decisions from witness Go code. Cleanup status
is now reported as data (CleanupStatus field) for the witness agent to
decide policy. Removes deprecated handleZombieCleanup (zero callers).

Fixes: gt-5rne
Worker: furiosa
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
